# zstack_aliyun_proxy_vswitch (Resource)

Aliyun Proxy VSwitch resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `aliyun_proxy_vpc_uuid` (String) The UUID of the Aliyun Proxy VPC
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default VSwitch
- `vpc_l3_network_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VPC L3 Network

### Optional

- `status` (String) The status of the Aliyun Proxy VSwitch

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) The name of the Aliyun Proxy VSwitch
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Aliyun Proxy VSwitch
